CREATE TABLE Employees (ID INT, Name VARCHAR(100), DepartmentID INT, Data XML);
CREATE TABLE Departments (DepartmentID INT, DepartmentName VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO Employees (ID, Name, DepartmentID, Data) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 1, '<data><info>Employee 1</info></data>'), (2, 'Bob', 2, NULL), (3, 'Charlie', 3, '<data><info>Employee 3</info></data>');
SELECT XMLCONCAT(Data) FROM Employees WHERE DepartmentID = 1;
SELECT XMLCONCAT(Data) FROM Employees WHERE DepartmentID = 2;
SELECT XMLCONCAT(Data) FROM Employees WHERE DepartmentID IN (SELECT DepartmentID FROM Departments WHERE DepartmentName = 'HR');
SELECT XMLCONCAT(e.Data) FROM Employees e JOIN Departments d ON e.DepartmentID = d.DepartmentID WHERE d.DepartmentName = 'Sales';
SELECT XMLCONCAT(NULL, Data) FROM Employees WHERE DepartmentID = 1;
SELECT XMLCONCAT((SELECT Data FROM Employees WHERE ID = 1), (SELECT Data FROM Employees WHERE ID = 3));
SELECT XMLCONCAT(Data) FROM Employees WHERE Data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT XMLCONCAT(Data) FROM Employees WHERE DepartmentID = 99;
SELECT XMLCONCAT((SELECT Data FROM Employees WHERE ID = 2), (SELECT NULL));
SELECT XMLCONCAT(NULL, NULL) FROM Employees WHERE DepartmentID = 1;
SELECT XMLCONCAT('first', Data, 'last') FROM Employees WHERE ID = 1;
SELECT XMLCONCAT((SELECT Data FROM Employees WHERE DepartmentID = 1), (SELECT Data FROM Employees WHERE DepartmentID = 3), NULL);
